Corollary 27.44 (cor:cxbeh): mult-Bessel nu=1/2, f=(1+x)sin^2x/x^2   [even orders]

n=2m=2:  HH=-4/3 (dif 0)
n=2m=4:  HH=65536/496125 (dif 0)
n=2m=6:  HH=-140737488355328/232539253693621875 (dif 0)
n=2m=8:  HH=309485009821345068724781056/2510525734822614923762155698515625 (dif 0)
n=2m=10:  HH=-11417981541647679048466287755595961091061972992/10352898688295064194371877935056856277516700837101806640625 (dif 0)

Resume: all dif = 0. Formula checked.
